---
title: "HRP 203 Assignment 4"
author: "Helene Nepomuceno"
date: "today"
format:
  pdf:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    embed-resources: true
    fig-width: 5.6
    fig-height: 3.3
editor: visual
---
## Introduction


##Methods
Data source.
Variables
Outcome
Analysis
Reproducibility statement: All analytic code will be made available on the GitHub repository for this project and is contained within the reproducible .qmd file here: 


##Results



##Discussion


## AI Disclosure
I did not use generative AI technology (e.g., ChatGPT) to complete any portion of the work.
